title: Indonesian President: Putin, Xi Jinping to Attend G20 Summit in Bali
description: Russian President Vladimir Putin as well as his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping, will visit the upcoming G20 Summit in Bali, Indonesian President Joko Widodo sa...
